sourceOwner: NONE_WITH_REASON: doctrine-named /cvf-core does not exist in the active tree
missingEdge: L4 Product Implementation doctrine layer has no proven active-tree doctrine-equivalent owner.
impact: Blocks L4 promotion claims only; does not block any other plane or module.

closeCondition.conditionText: L4 module exits Pre-Public Status per its own README self-declaration and an operator-authorized promotion review accepts it as the doctrine-equivalent owner.

reopenCondition.conditionText: Operator authorizes a fresh L4 promotion review citing new evidence beyond the current draft/pre-public status.

actionOwner: PARKED_WITH_REASON: no current evidence supports promotion; tracked in MSEA-R96 and this catalog only

rejectedCandidates.rejectionReason: self-declared Pre-Public Status, not yet published, matches module inventory draft/future-facing status
